mapper.select:
select [YLJGDM] ,[GHJLID] ,[JZLSH] ,[GRBSLX] ,CASE WHEN GRBSH=GRBSH_LS THEN GRBSH ELSE '
'+GRBSH+'
' END GRBSH ,CASE WHEN GTHBZ=GTHBZ_LS THEN GTHBZ ELSE '
'+GTHBZ+'
' END GTHBZ ,[STFBH] ,[GTHSJ] ,[GHLB] ,[SFJZ] ,[JZXZ] ,[GHTJBM] ,[BXLX] ,[KSBM] ,[KSMC] ,[LCYXLXDM] ,[GHYSBH] ,[GHYSXM] ,[TXBZ] ,[WDBZ] ,[GHZFY] ,[XGBZ] ,[VZ_XM] ,[VZ_XB] ,[VZ_CSRQ] ,[VZ_GHCZYDM] ,[VZ_GHCZYXM] from VzDataQuality.dbo.TB_MZ_GHMXB
SELECT TOP 1 * FROM MZXX..TB_MZ_GHMXB where ghjlid=#{key}
